description: You are an ML Engineer debugging a FastAPI application serving a scikit-learn model in /home/ga/workspace/ml_api/. The API predictions currently do not match the original training notebook due to preprocessing mismatches, and the server crashes under load. Resolve the issues in api/schemas.py, api/preprocessing.py, and api/app.py to ensure the API correctly handles data types (specifically bmi), array shapes, feature scaling for numerical features (age, bmi, heart_rate), and categorical encoding for blood_type according to the training logic. Additionally, optimize the model loading process to prevent memory leaks and ensure the server remains stable. Verify your fixes using pytest tests/test_api.py.
